|desc=Lana was first seen riding a [[Poké Ride]] {{p|Tauros}} around [[Pokémon School]] in a race with {{an|Sophocles}} and {{an|Mallow}} which ended when {{Ash}} unknowingly crossed the racetrack.

None of Tauros's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lana
|pkmn=Stoutland
|type1=Normal
|img=Lana Stoutland.png
|cap=A Poké Ride Stoutland
|epnum=SM032
|epname=Treasure Hunt Akala Style!
|vajp=
|vaen=Marc Thompson
|desc=Lana used a [[Poké Ride]] {{p|Stoutland}} to hunt for treasure around [[Akala Island]]. At first, Stoutland was unresponsive to Lana and only interested in eating berries but after seeing how Lana was prepared to protect it and {{TP|Lana|Popplio}} from a {{p|Garbodor}}, it helped Lana and found her a [[Z-Ring]] ore.

Stoutland's known moves are {{m|Tackle}} and {{m|Giga Impact}}.}}
